data.title: Wolfspeed, Inc. Announces Date of Fiscal Third Quarter Earnings Call for May 5, 2026
data.description: Wolfspeed, Inc., a prominent player in silicon carbide technology, has announced that it will hold a conference call and audio webcast to go over its third-quarter outcomes on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, at 5:00 pm EST. The event will be led by Robert Feurle, the Chief Executive Officer, and Gregor van Issum, the Chief Financial Officer. Those interested can tune in to the live webcast of the earnings conference call and access the earnings release on Wolfspeed’s Investor Relations website. The company's stock is listed on NYSE under the symbol WOLF.

data.title: Rockefeller Foundation Announces Second Class of U.S. Big Bets Fellows at Baltimore Convening
data.description: The Rockefeller Foundation has selected 10 innovative individuals from various parts of the US for its fellowship program. These fellows are committed to advancing economic opportunities and improving the prosperity of their communities. Each fellow is working on unique projects aimed at creating pathways for economic growth and empowerment within their respective communities.

data.title: JumpCloud Wins 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year Award
data.description: Today, in Louisville, Colorado, it was announced that JumpCloud Inc. has been awarded the prestigious 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year Award in the Google Workspace: Impact category. This award recognizes the outstanding strategic innovation and value provided by JumpCloud as a partner of Google Cloud. This achievement highlights the company's dedication to excellence and its commendable work in the field.

data.title: Green Builder Media Announces 2026 Sustainable Brand Index
data.description: In its recent report, Green Builder Media unveiled the outcomes of the 2026 Sustainable Brand Index, an annual ranking of the most reliable manufacturers in the building sector. Released from LAKE CITY, Colo., on April 21, 2026, the index showcases the top companies trusted by builders, architects, and professionals in the industry. This index provides a comprehensive insight into the brands that have gained trust and recognition within the market.

data.title: KBRA Assigns Preliminary Ratings to OBX 2026-NQM6 Trust
data.description: KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to 13 classes of mortgage-backed notes from OBX 2026-NQM6 Trust, worth a total of $849.5 million. The collateral backing these notes includes 1,534 residential mortgages, with 93.8% being fixed-rate mortgages and 6.2% hybrid adjustable-rate mortgages. Nearly half of the loans are classified as non-qualified mortgages (47.0%), while 49.8% are exempt from certain regulations.

data.title: Six Months After Dr. Jane Goodall's Passing, Los Angeles Students Bring Her Vision to Life with Tree Plantings and Nurseries in Fire-Impacted Areas
data.description: In Pasadena, California on April 21, 2026, a significant achievement was reached during Earth Week as students introduced a new model to aid in wildfire recovery efforts. Approximately 1,000 students from Los Angeles came together at EF Academy Pasadena to kick off TREEAMS (Trees + Dreams), a student-led initiative aimed at supporting this cause. The project received backing from Dr. [Name], and has now reached a major milestone after six months of operation.

data.title: A Timely Call for Unity and Healing: New Book "The Peace Guidebook" Reframes How We Find Peace in Everyday Life
data.description: Renowned authors Elizabeth Hamilton-Guarino and Dr. Katie Eastman have unveiled a new influential manual aimed at aiding individuals in fostering hope, healing, and harmony. Released in Portland, Maine on April 21, 2036, this guide comes at a crucial time when the global community is witnessing escalating challenges. With record-breaking sales, this book is resonating deeply with readers seeking solace and guidance amidst tumultuous times.
